content.raw:
AI Service Implementation Pack

Standard scope and commercial structure for Newcastle local businesses.

1) Scope

  • Website AI assistant and lead flow design
  • Enquiry triage and qualification logic
  • Form and CTA path cleanup for conversion
  • Baseline tracking and reporting events

2) Deliverables

  • Prompt and response library
  • Routing rules and handoff map
  • Priority page updates (CTA, FAQ, conversion copy)
  • Launch checklist and handover notes

3) Rollout Timeline

  • Week 1: audit and architecture
  • Week 2: build and integration
  • Week 3: testing and QA fixes
  • Week 4: launch and optimisation pass

4) Commercial Model

  • Initial setup fee (based on scope)
  • Monthly optimisation plan
  • Optional add-ons: CRM mapping, campaign landing flows

5) Boundaries

  • We optimise conversion and workflow quality, not guaranteed revenue outcomes
  • Third-party platform limits may affect automation depth
  • Approval delays can shift timeline

6) Next Step

Start With a Free Business Audit Request Detailed Quote

Call 02 40755307 or email hello@newcastlehub.info.

Who This AI Pack Is For

This pack fits local businesses that need practical AI implementation, not generic consulting. We focus on measurable outcomes, process clarity, and deployable assets.

Implementation Pack FAQ

What is included in the implementation pack?

Scope definition, delivery milestones, operating boundaries, and rollout priorities tied to business goals.

How long does implementation usually take?

Most small-to-medium implementations run in phases across 2-6 weeks depending on stack complexity.

Can this connect with website and lead workflows?

Yes. We align automation with website forms, CRM handoff, and conversion tracking where applicable.

Get Free Business Audit

Related: AI Service | Our Services | Contact
